problem: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it?
hypothesis: If Bacteriophage surface display for targeting is applied to instability, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 17 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
